title: Bhuna Italian Summer Savory Stir-fry
description: A bitter, juicy, cozy Italian dish featuring dried summer savory leaves in a bhuna-style stir-fry with whole30-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add bell peppers and onion to the hot pan. Stir occasionally until vegetables are slightly tender but still crisp.
Reduce heat to medium and add minced garlic, followed by summer savory leaves. Cook for about 2 minutes or until fragrant.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve immediately as a side dish or over whole30-friendly grains like quinoa or cauliflower rice.
